## Checklist

- [ ] Feature branch off `dev`, targeting `dev`, focused on one feature or fix.
- [ ] Follows the project style and Conventional Commit messages.
- [ ] `black .`, `isort .`, and `mypy src` are clean.
- [ ] `tox` (or `pytest`) passes; tests added/updated for the change.
- [ ] Docs and screenshots updated for user-visible changes.
